name: Summer Squash Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 Can (6 oz.) Boned Chicken, cut up
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub the squash; do not peel.
2. Cut 12 paper-thin slices from the narrow ends and place them in cold water to crisp. Reserve these slices for garnish.
3. Cut the remainder of the squash (seeded if necessary) into small chunks to make about 5 to 6 cups.
4. Sauté very slowly in butter, seasoned with garlic salt, salt, pepper, and dried rosemary. Keep the pan tightly covered and do not allow the squash to brown. Add a tablespoon or two of water if needed when the squash is softened.
5. Puree the mixture in an electric blender.
6. Return the purée to the pan and add chicken broth, water, and boned chicken. Heat until the flavors are well blended.
7. Pour into serving dishes or soup bowls and garnish with the crisp squash slices.
Makes 1 quart
